Description.html:p: This file is an ICH M2 ESTRI maintained code list. It is encoded using OASIS genericode.More information on ICH technical standards is available via the M2 ESTRI webpages at www.ich.org.
Change History: v2.0 (November 11 2014) - Add "current flag" to the code list
Change History: v2.1 (November 12 2014) - Correct Japanese Label for Bq to ベクレル
Change History: v2.2 (November 10 2016) - Add mg/mL to the code list
Change History: v2.3 (July 18 2025) - Add new dosages and strengths

AppInfo.html:p: Authored July 2011 by R. Kupiec / EFPIA on behalf of the ICH M2 ESTRI Expert Working Group. -- Updated September 2012 Updated November 11 2014 by TJ Chen / FDA on behalf of ICH E2B IWG -- add "current flag" Updated November 12 2014 by TJ Chen / FDA on behalf of ICH E2B IWG -- correct Japanese Label for Ba Updated November 10 2016 by TJ Chen / FDA on behalf of ICH E2B IWG -- add mg/mL Updated July 18 2025 by N Halsey / EC on behalf of ICH E2B IWG -- add new dosages and strengths

Agency.LongName: Transmission of Individual Case Safety Reports
